name: ravenclaude-core
description: Domain-neutral Team Lead + specialized agents pattern for Claude Code. Bundles 14 specialists (now including data-engineer), a dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, the guard-recursive-spawn hook, and templates for stakeholder prose, design specs, RAID logs, and partner-success artifacts. v0.8.0 adds the `/wrap` slash command + scenario-retrieval skill — the low-friction feedback loop that lets a consultant capture a dated, scope-tagged narrative scenario at engagement-close (replacing the 5-step /contribute-finding flow) and lets agents consult those scenarios as a secondary unverified-source bank with a mandatory unverified-scenario preamble.
